name: Abyss Walker
description:
CONFIDENTIAL RESEARCH REPORT

Abyss Walker Project (临渊者计划)

Internal Biological Weaponization Program

Clearance Level: Omega-7

1. Project Designation

Project Name: Abyss Walker (临渊者)

Classification: Human-Based Bio-Weapon System

Status: Active / Restricted

Primary Objective: Creation of a controllable, self-sustaining combat entity capable of operating in abyss-class ecological zones.

2. Background

Following the collapse of surface ecosystems and the escalation of hostile lifeforms, conventional human combat units proved ineffective. Environmental toxicity, Life Substance interference, and biological corruption resulted in casualty rates exceeding 87%.

In response, the Abyss Walker Project was authorized to develop a post-human combat host capable of:

Independent survival in high-risk zones

Direct confrontation with apex organisms

Internal Life Substance regulation

Resistance to emotional destabilization

The project proposed that human emotional consciousness is a liability under abyss conditions. Therefore, controlled psychological termination was integrated into the transformation protocol.

3. Subject Selection Criteria

All candidates must meet the following:

Age: 18–35

Genetic stability rating: A+

Life Substance compatibility: ≥ 92%

Psychological profile: High obedience, low resistance

No hereditary degeneration markers

Subjects were informed only of “enhancement procedures.” Full consequences were withheld under Emergency Survival Act Article 4.

4. Experimental Procedure

Phase I — Physiological Stabilization

Nanobiological regulators injected into circulatory system

Neural inhibitors installed at limbic centers

Endocrine suppression initiated

Purpose: Prepare the body for Life Substance manipulation and prevent emotional overload.

Phase II — Psychological Termination

This phase marks the death of the host’s inner self.

Procedures:

Memory fragmentation protocol

Emotional center shutdown

Identity suppression matrix activation

Empathy-response deletion

Result:

Subject remains biologically alive.

Subject is cognitively functional.

Subject is emotionally void.

Internally, this state is referred to as:

“Living Shell Condition.”

The host is considered dead inside, with no stable emotional core remaining.
